title: ophrys fusca subsp. atlantica
intro: Ophrys fusca subsp. atlantica, also known as the Atlantic Bee Orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as ulcers and arthritis. Ophrys fusca subsp. atlantica can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a convenient and accessible way.
